title: Techit's Thai Fixes
description: This simple resource pack fixes Thai language issues and appearance.
body:
# Techit's Thai Fixes
Hi! My name is Techit, and I'm the creator of this resource pack—a Minecraft resource pack designed to fix the appearance of the Thai language in Minecraft. Without this resource pack, the Thai language is very hard to read and looks quite ugly.

## In-game image
![Minecraft 1.21.8 at main menu with Techit's ThaiFix installed](https://thawia.ng/portal/f/assets/thaifix-demo.png)

## Downloads
Currently, Modrinth is the primary source for downloads.  
You can download the pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/techit-thaifixes/versions).

## Community / Bug reports
You can report bugs or join my community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/xwPNqpdsYK).

## Credits and Notice
- The "Kanit" and "Mali" typefaces were created by Cadson Demak and are licensed under the Open Font License (OFL).
- Special thanks to "FatFish," who originally created the Minecraft Resource Pack "Thai Fix."
